LINK FOR PROTOTYPE (INVITATION HAS BEEN: DATA ENTRY PRIORITIES (do these in order):
1. Cities — Fill in your launch cities first

3. POI_Connections — Use Amap/Baidu Maps to get realistic travel times between your top POIs

5. City_Connections — Add when you support multi-city trips

• visitor_tips should answer: what would I tell a friend visiting for the first time?
• Dropdowns are pre-configured for category, price_level, indoor/outdoor, etc.
